arts.ttl: Done Deal: Juventus to Sign Lloyd Kelly
arts.sum: Juventus have finalised an agreement to sign English defender Lloyd Kelly from Newcastle United. The Bianconeri, who had already welcomed Renato Veiga on a dry loan from Chelsea this transfer window, were in need of additional defensive reinforcement due to injuries to Bremer and Cabal, and more recently, Kalulu. The Lloyd Kelly Profile After exploring various options, including renewed interest in Todibo following summer contacts, and considering Hancko from Feyenoord and Skriniar (who moved from PSG to Fenerbahce), Juventus has landed on Kelly.
